case_title: JUAN A. LARA VS. RAFAEL I. POLANCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARA, JUAN A. AS TO DEFENDANT POLANCO, RAFAEL I. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
